titleStmt.title: SII 17.593: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 593. (A.R. No. 548 of 1904). TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākara in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This inscription does not give the name of the king. It is dated in the 202nd day of the 13th year. Palaeographically it may be assigned to the 12th century A.D.

It records a grant of land in Vāyaṟṟūr, a brahmadēya to one Pūṅgōyilnambi who composed the Vīraṇukka-vijayam in honour of Vīraśōḻa-aṇukkar patronised as our sons (nammakkaḷ) by the god Tiruvārūruḍaiyār Vīdiviḍaṅgadēvar, when he was witnessing a dance by Pūṅgōyil Nāyaka-ttalaikkōli at Dēvāśriyan. The grant is stated to have been made by the deity at the instance of Tyāgavinōda-kkaḍigaimārāyan who acted as the kēḻvi. Muttiṟattān figures as the signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .. yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu nāḷ 2 100 2 . tiruvāruruṭaiyār vitiviṭaṅkadevar devā śrīyan tirukkāvaṇatte Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu pūṅkoyil nāyakattalaikkoliyai Āṭṭaṅ kaṇṭaruḷa nam makkaḷ viracoḻa Aṇukkarai viraṇukka vijayam
pāṭina pūṅkoyil nampikku brahmadeyam vāyaṟṟūril Iṟaiyilinilamāṉa kanakarāyan nila menṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattile nilaṅkalantapaṭi nilam Araiyum tenkuḷaṅkaraiyil kūttan maṉaikaḷil kiḻakkaṭaiya maṉai 1 Ivaṉukkum I(van)va
n vamśattārkkum kāṇiyāka kuṭuttomenṟu tinruvāymoḻintaruḷit tiyākavinotak kaṭikaimārāyan keḻviyāl keḻppittapaṭikku Aruḷāl Ivai muttiṟattā neḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.593 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
